summary.lv: Vāciski runājošs 1. līmeņa IT atbalsta speciālists Arvato Systems Latvia, apstrādājot pieprasījumus un incidentus vācu uzņēmumu klientiem.
summary.en: German-speaking 1st level IT Service Desk Specialist at Arvato Systems Latvia, handling customer inquiries, processing technical incidents and dispatching tickets for German-speaking enterprise clients.
